ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teaching_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the teaching method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the teaching method */,
  "is_in_class" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the method is in-class */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the user */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teaching_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching practice */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) who uses the practice */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teaching method */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the practice (e.g., one or more class periods, throughout the semester) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of users who use the practice */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the practice was used */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "student_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from students */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the practice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teaching_practices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teaching_practices_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES teaching_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., vendor module, CALI lesson) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the resource */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) who uses the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external resource */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the usage (e.g., outside class time) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of users who use the resource */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students using the resource */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact on student learning */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the usage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES external_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor presentation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) who invited the vendor */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who presented */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date of the presentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the presentation */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the presentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the presentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_presentations_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_presentations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor's services */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the vendor information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student engagement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) who requires engagement */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external resource */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the engagement (e.g., outside class time) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students engaged */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students engaged */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact on student learning */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the engagement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_engagement_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES external_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class period */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) who taught the class */,
  "class_date" TEXT /* Date of the class period */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the class period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class period */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the class */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the class period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_periods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semester_instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester instruction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) who provided the instruction */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the instruction took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instruction */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the semester */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the instruction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semester_instructions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research requirement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) who imposed the requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., in-class, external) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the requirement */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students affected */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the requirement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_requirements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "student_count" INTEGER /* Number of students accessing the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES external_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departmental_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departmental contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "preferred_format" TEXT /* Preferred format for accessing the resource (e.g., online, PDF) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the preferences were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES external_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teaching_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (faculty or librarian) being evaluated */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teaching practice */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teaching_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teaching_evaluations_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES teaching_practices ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teaching_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual report */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES faculties ("user_id")
)
